budgets.derivation: Sum of one full ATB dispatchable-generation option at every deduplicated physical anchor; dispatchable generation is the least-cost option available in PV-shortfall islanding scenarios.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

budgets.derivation: Minimum feasible islanding portfolio plus the least-cost full PV option in the discrete catalog.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

budgets.derivation: Minimum feasible islanding portfolio plus the cumulative cheapest PV options nearest one-half of the catalog-wide PV add-on cost.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

budgets.derivation: Observed IEEE123 SLSQP selected cost; it equals the deduplicated full dispatchable+PV catalog portfolio.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

budgets.derivation: SLSQP portfolio plus cumulative cheapest full BESS options nearest the midpoint between the observed SLSQP and QCi costs.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

budgets.derivation: Observed challenge-selected IEEE123 QCi SC-CMPO portfolio cost; the discrete field records the largest derived catalog prefix used to audit feasibility beneath this cap.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

construction_policy.minimum: one full dispatchable-generation option per deduplicated physical anchor
construction_policy.intermediate: cumulative cheapest full ATB-backed options nearest catalog cost landmarks
